visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens on a bright, sunny street in Australia. A male creator with a white beanie and black sweatshirt is speaking enthusiastically to the camera, while a female in a white hoodie stands beside him, occasionally adjusting her hair. The background features historic European-style architecture with black wrought-iron fences and parked cars. (2) The scene cuts to an indoor kitchen and living area. The male creator, now in a purple tie-dye shirt, claps his hands to initiate a room tour. The setting is a modern, spacious homestay with light-colored cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a minimalist design. (3) The camera moves through various rooms of the house. We see a laundry room with a front-loading washing machine, a cozy living area with a dark green sofa and a yellow pillow, and an enclosed outdoor patio with artificial green walls and a black wicker hanging chair. The lighting is bright and clean throughout. (4) A second male in a red jacket joins the scene, standing in a hallway. The creators interact, pointing at different features of the house. The male in purple performs an exaggerated 'crab walk' in the spacious kitchen to demonstrate its width. (5) The final phase takes place in a hallway and bedroom entrance. The male in the purple shirt continues to tease the female creator, who leans against the wall laughing and reacting to his jokes. The flooring is a light wood laminate, and the walls are white with simple decor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 跟大家介紹一下. [Subtitle]: 因為有些的觀眾. [Subtitle]: 可能不知道. [Subtitle]: 我們澳洲啊. [Subtitle]: 曾經是這個二伯. [Subtitle]: 在這邊生活. [Subtitle]: 接近三年的時間. [Subtitle]: 跟我們這個. [Variety]: (我沒有吃醋). [Subtitle]: 前男友這邊來這邊算是. [Subtitle]: 追尋了一個夢想. (2) [Subtitle]: 但是後來為了. [Slogan]: me 追愛. [Subtitle]: 所以當時勒. [Subtitle]: 就從南半球. [Subtitle]: 就回來這個北半球了啊. (3) [Variety]: 好煩. (4) [Subtitle]: 來開箱一下我們. [Subtitle]: 這次的民宿. [Variety]: (沒有要放過你^^). [Variety]: (無力反抗了). (5) [Logo]: 【廚房】. [Subtitle]: 哇這太太了吧. [Subtitle]: 對啊好棒哦. [Subtitle]: 很大~哎~~. [Subtitle]: 可以這樣橫著走. [Subtitle]: 五個人煮飯. [Subtitle]: 都不會覺得擠. (6) [Subtitle]: 這邊大概一坪. [Subtitle]: 臺北可能要100萬. [Subtitle]: 很貴啊. (7) [Logo]: 【洗衣房】. [Subtitle]: 等一下他進來. [Subtitle]: 屬什麼還有客廳. [Subtitle]: 他這個是算一個小房間的. [Subtitle]: 這算是一個小房間. [Variety]: 這我們家客廳了吧!!. (8) [Subtitle]: 廚房的外面有一個. [Subtitle]: 完全密閉的一個空間. [Variety]: 很Chill. [Subtitle]: 有個人的隱私. [Subtitle]: 好棒哦. [Subtitle]: 這種設計很不錯欸. [Subtitle]: 在臺北要搞出這一塊地. [Variety]: 這裡幾百萬哦. [Variety]: 1F幾百萬. [Variety]: 2F幾百萬. (9) [Subtitle]: 這很長哎. [Subtitle]: 這間房子好大哦. [Subtitle]: 欸不錯欸. [Subtitle]: 你前夫對你不錯哎. [Subtitle]: 不是!!!. [Subtitle]: 留這房子給你. [Variety]: (發出趣味信號!!). [Subtitle]: 那時候打算生比較多個. (10) [Subtitle]: 啊. [Subtitle]: 這樣如果包棟的話. [Subtitle]: 一天大概多少錢. [Subtitle]: 最多5個房間哦. [Variety]: 4個晚上 28,000多. [Subtitle]: 28,000多台幣啊. [Subtitle]: 還可以啊. (11) [Subtitle]: 隔壁飯店一間. [Variety]: 400澳幣/晚. [Subtitle]: 台幣8千. [Subtitle]: 對啊. [Subtitle]: 算是待你不薄啊. (12) [Subtitle]: 算是你前夫. [Variety]: (佩潔放棄了). [Subtitle]: 不錯啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male lead, 1 female lead, 1 male supporting guest.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male lead wearing a white beanie and black sweatshirt, later a purple tie-dye shirt; female lead in a white oversized hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Historical residential street in Australia with Victorian-style houses, followed by a modern, high-end Airbnb interior featuring a large kitchen, laundry, and a small private patio.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male greeting accompanied by an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM featuring a steady synth beat. There is subtle outdoor wind and street ambiance. (2) A sharp 'Clap' SFX (0:19) triggers the transition to the indoor phase. The male's voice becomes more resonant as he claps and starts cheering. (3) A 'Whoosh' SFX (0:26) occurs as the camera pans to the kitchen, followed by high-pitched vocal reactions from both the male and female speakers. (4) A comic 'Ding' SFX (0:39) highlights the text label for the laundry room. The BGM remains consistent, maintaining a playful, vlog-style energy. (5) Fast-paced banter continues with several short 'Stinger' SFX during transitions between rooms. The male's speech rate increases as he teases the female creator about her past. (6) A final comical 'Meme' style sound effect plays during the closing price comparison segment as the vocal track ends on a teasing tone.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a comedic travel vlog and house tour, showcasing a spacious and modern homestay in Australia while using a teasing narrative about a creator's personal history to engage the audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic 'variety show' editing with heavy use of on-screen text and sound effects to maintain high viewer engagement.
